title: selaginella carnerosana
intro: Selaginella carnerosana, also known as the Mexican spikemoss or carneros spikemoss, is a type of evergreen, epiphytic plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties, which have been found to be effective in treating various health conditions. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Selaginella carnerosana is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it can also be dried and used as a powder or added to skincare products for its potential skin benefits.
